text.message: Too many options to choose that were not good, idk if this was the right call at all lol
I clocked on the wrong one…
But I clocked on the wrong offer
Red taking 6-4-11 was kinda devastating to the board lol
I didn’t know what else to take..
I figured you'd take 9/4/2 and cut black off to the port
lol you're doing pretty well in your current position
Yeah, better than expected for sure lol
Yes, blocking the 2 last place players makes sense
keep blocking green he's about to win
That’s why he didn’t take the wheat!
Like I said, Red, you not taking 9-4-2 just catastrophic for the game lol
still a long way to go
no wheat is an uphill battle
Something tells me it's not long at all
You're on 7 with road & don't need as much wheat with sheep port & city already
Still a long way to go, Black?
look at red pulling devs like mad
i'll trade ore for wheat stop porting
that was literally the last place for me to settle lol
Only way I can take road
I don’t have any of that…
dont give the win to red
